productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Polka Brown Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of Leatherette with an ostrich skin design for durability and style Has one main zippered compartment Two inner zippered compartments with organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles with mock snake skin design for carrying ease and style One magnetic closure compartment on the front for additional space Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
